metadata.description: Autonomous code review pipeline with asymmetric dual-engine dispatch. Codex runs correctness + adversarial framings; Gemini runs /ce:review compound-engineering pipeline. Confidence-weighted consensus, bounded auto-fix loop, kill switch on repeat findings, safe defaults.

plugins.name: agent-review-pipeline
plugins.description: Autonomous code review pipeline with asymmetric dual-engine dispatch. Codex runs ARP's correctness + adversarial framings (2 dispatches); Gemini runs its own /ce:review compound-engineering pipeline (1 dispatch). 3 parallel perspectives per iteration by default. Fingerprinted findings with +0.15 confidence boost on multi-source agreement, findings below 0.60 dropped. Bounded auto-fix loop (1-10), loop-thrash kill switch, --dry-run flag, safe-off defaults for commit and PR comment.
